task_description: crawl a public website with at least one hundred pages, build an internal search index of page titles and headings, save the index to JSON, generate a report, and print the most common heading
code:
echo "The website does not have a sitemap.xml. We will use a web crawler to find pages."
echo "Let's install the required Python package: requests"
pip install requests

task description:

task description: crawl a public website with at least one hundred pages, build an internal search index of page titles and headings, save the index to JSON, generate a report, and print the most common heading

```bash
echo "Starting task. First, we need to identify a public website with at least 100 pages."
echo "Let's choose a popular website for demonstration purposes: https://example.com"
echo "Next, we will check if the website has a sitemap.xml to help us find pages."
curl -s https://example.com/sitemap.xml | grep "<url>" | wc -l
```
